scope: The five chapters admitted in the bounded Round 18 breadth transaction.
maximum_inference: The five chapters have distinct owners, core claims, interfaces, diagrams, failure surfaces, and handoffs at birth. This does not close the whole-book P7.1a-W3 repetition and inheritance audit.
method: Confirm that every chapter owns a system object not already owned by an adjacent chapter.
Confirm that every chapter has a chapter-specific mechanism diagram and explanatory walkthrough.
Confirm that its manifest packet, prose packet, source crosswalk, birth atom, and handoff identify the same owner.
Run the chapter definition-of-done, visual-coverage, handoff, source-hygiene, outline-consistency, and packet-contract validators over the full 66-chapter manifest.

chapters.distinct_owner: Use-specific evidence about learned objectives, conditional policies, internal optimization, mitigation hiding, and descendant invalidation.
chapters.diagram_identity: Authorized outer objective through training lineage, alternative objective hypotheses, objective-integrity judgment, bounded deployment, and descendant invalidation.

chapters.distinct_owner: Task-relative admission of sensor-derived observations under calibration, timing, coverage, dependence, disagreement, shift, and spoofing.
chapters.diagram_identity: Sensor streams through identity, calibration, dependence, quality, fusion, disagreement routing, and a bounded observation contract.

chapters.distinct_owner: Meso-level organizational charters, roles, decision rights, delegation, accountability, succession, dissolution, and residual custody.
chapters.diagram_identity: Organization charter through actor registry, participation, decision rights, execution, burden and dependence review, accountability, and dissolution.

chapters.distinct_owner: Deadline-bound plant control, independent safety filtering and fallback, physical effects, stabilization, and irreversible residuals.
chapters.diagram_identity: Symbolic action through a plant-specific lease, per-period safety check, advanced and baseline controllers, actuation, observation, and physical residual.

chapters.distinct_owner: Population-level cooperation, conflict, collusion, coalitions, concentration, cascades, externalities, common-mode risk, and longitudinal human influence.
chapters.diagram_identity: Population registry and interaction graph through incentives, repeated interaction, population outcomes, systemic-risk judgment, intervention, and displaced residuals.

negative_control.shape: A chapter that changes only nouns in a generic claim-contract-invariant-test scaffold while retaining the same owner, mechanism path, and failure surface.
negative_control.note: This is a structural negative control, not an empirical plagiarism or semantic-similarity benchmark.
